examples.title: Basic Structure Declaration and Usage
examples.description: Example showing how to declare a simple structure, define variables, initialize, and access members
examples.explanation: This code demonstrates: 1) Structure definition using 'struct' keyword with tag 'Student', 2) Three members of different types (char array, int, float), 3) Declaring a variable using 'struct Student s1', 4) Accessing members using dot operator (s1.rollNo), 5) Initialization during declaration using braces.

examples.title: Nested Structure Declaration
examples.description: Example demonstrating nested structures - a structure containing another structure as a member
examples.explanation: This example shows: 1) Defining an inner structure 'Date' with day, month, year, 2) Defining outer structure 'Employee' containing two Date members, 3) Initializing nested structures using nested braces: {day, month, year}, 4) Accessing nested members with chained dots: emp.birthDate.day

examples.title: Typedef with Structures
examples.description: Using typedef to create aliases for structure types, simplifying variable declaration
examples.explanation: This code demonstrates typedef benefits: 1) typedef creates an alias 'Point' for the anonymous struct, 2) Variables can be declared as 'Point p1' instead of 'struct Point p1', 3) This makes code cleaner and more readable, 4) Works with any structure type including named structs
